failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call by dropping the provided item_id and replacing the provided string product_id with numeric 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to determine whether item 1151293680 for product 1656367028 has backlight=RGB using ProductCatalogSearch. All required information was available from index 1. At index 2, the agent constructed an invalid tool payload: {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using an integer instead of the required string product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3 confirming the invocation was malformed.
